pi_items.source: Web search confirms these coordinates correspond to Vandenberg Space Force Base. The task instructions explicitly require configuring Latitude = 34.7420 N.
Web search confirms 120.5724 W matches Vandenberg Space Force Base. The task instructions explicitly require configuring Longitude = 120.5724 W.
Web search indicates Vandenberg base elevation is roughly 112 meters. The task instructions explicitly require configuring Altitude = 112 meters.

grep of the real Celestrak TLE data provided in the workspace data/ directory (amateur.txt, stations.txt, weather.txt) confirms these are the exact NORAD IDs for ISS (ZARYA), CSS (TIANHE), and SUOMI NPP respectively. This also matches external verification via web search.

privileged_info_summary: The required satellite NORAD IDs (ISS: 25544, CSS TIANHE: 48274, SUOMI NPP: 37849) have been verified against the provided Celestrak TLE data files. The coordinates for Vandenberg Tracking Station (Vandenberg_SCC) explicitly provided in the task description (Lat 34.7420, Lon -120.5724, Alt 112) match real-world references for Vandenberg Space Force Base and its associated airfield (KVBG).
